log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Tabaxi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:14+3=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:19+-2=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:7+-2=5 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 1/3 targets affected.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Tabaxi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:6+9=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 35 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: 32/67
→ Tabaxi — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern! [CON save 15 vs DC 17]
Frost Giant attacks Tabaxi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:5+9=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 19 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: 13/67
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Tabaxi — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:7+6=13 vs AC 14] MISS.
=== ROUND 2 ===
--- Tabaxi — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Tabaxi — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre can't reach Tabaxi — Bardic Musician with Greatclub (distance 10ft, range 5ft).
--- Frost Giant's turn ---
Frost Giant attacks Tabaxi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:2+9=11 vs AC 14] MISS.
Frost Giant attacks Tabaxi — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:8+9=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 39 damage. Tabaxi — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
→ Tabaxi — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Greater Invisibility! [CON save 12 vs DC 19]
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 2 rounds ===
